Get Started

Welcome to Coinaire Crypto Wallet

Enter the Future of Finance. Simplify Your Crypto Journey with Our Unrivaled Wallet Experience!

64,739

Happy Customers

4.8/5

  • Rating
Trusted by 1600+ of the world's most popular companies

Own your crypto in a private and safe way

Privacy-preserving

Our platform prioritizes your privacy with top-tier encryption and decentralized features. Your information stays confidential and your transactions remain discreet. Your security is our utmost concern.

Open Source API Server

Our platform's open-source API server offers unparalleled flexibility, empowering developers with boundless possibilities. Dive into seamless integration, innovation, and endless customization options to fuel your projects.

Vetted partners

Coinaire doesn’t promote any provider: but we do vet them. Coinaire ensures that all providers comply with applicable regulations and that they are legitimate, responsible parties.

Send Crypto

Send crypto at your preferred confirmation speed and network fee. Our ETH Gas Meter gives you real-time updates on gas fees and transaction speeds.

Buy, sell, and swap crypto in minutes

Effortless Crypto Transactions in Minutes: Buy, Sell, and Swap with Ease. Experience seamless transactions on our platform, allowing you to swiftly buy, sell, or swap cryptocurrencies within minutes. Unlock the convenience and speed you need in managing your crypto assets.

Want to buy bitcoin? Swap your Ethereum (ETH) for Stellar Lumens (XLM)? Settle on-chain? We got you covered.

Sign up now

Safe way to buy and sell crypto

Buy and Sell Crypto with Confidence. Our platform ensures a safe environment for buying and selling cryptocurrencies. With robust security measures and verified processes, experience peace of mind while exploring the crypto market's potential.

  • Earn a 10-100% bonus on your weekly round-ups.
  • Save money when you shop at some of your spots.
  • Automatically invest part of every pay of crypto.

Automate your coins within minutes

Become a better investor on the go, right in the app. Join a new generation of crypto investors. Easy interface to create an account.

  • Create an account easily

    Sign up on web, iOS or Android and go through our easy registration process.

  • Link your bank account & make a easy withdrawal

    Add a personal checking account at the bottom of link.

  • Start buying & selling crypto as you wish

    Although many people prefer to apply the buy and hold.

Download now to invest crypto safely

Your security and convenience are our priorities. Explore the world of cryptocurrencies confidently, knowing our platform is designed with your safety in mind. Join us in shaping the future of decentralized finance.
